nasb.text: You shall put this altar in front of the veil that is near the ark of the testimony, in front of the mercy seat that is over the ark of the testimony, where I will meet with you.

esv.text: And you shall put it in front of the veil that is above the ark of the testimony, in front of the mercy seat that is above the testimony, where I will meet with you.

cnv.text: 你要把壇放在法櫃前面的幔幕前，面對著法櫃上的施恩座，就是我與你相會的地方。

ccb.text: 要把香坛放在约柜前幔子的外面，对着约柜上的施恩座——就是我要跟你会面的地方。
